plugin.name: wayfire-curtain-peek
plugin._long: Split the screen down the middle and slide both halves aside to reveal the desktop.

option.name: dismiss
option._long: Optional secondary binding that only closes the curtain. Unset by default so it does not conflict with other plugins that consume Escape.

option.name: fold_count
option._long: How many vertical pleats each curtain half gathers into as it slides aside. Higher looks like finer fabric.

option.name: fold_depth
option._long: How strongly each pleat pinches the snapshot horizontally. 0 keeps the slide flat; higher bunches the cloth more.

option.name: fold_shade
option._long: Opacity of the shadow/highlight overlay that fakes the lighting of the folds, giving the flat snapshot a 3D look.

option.name: backdrop_color
option._long: Flat colour shown behind the lumen-desktop grid once the wallpaper splits away. Defaults to a GNOME-Shell-like grey.

option.name: desktop_app_id
option._long: App-id (layer-shell namespace) of the desktop grid surface. It is excluded from the split, kept hidden while the curtain is closed, and revealed only while it is open.
